task_completion.description: Divide the lot into at least three distinct named surface areas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan view in SweetHome3D for at least three distinct created rooms/areas, each with a visible text label (name) such as 'Main Plaza', 'Picnic Lawn', etc.

task_completion.description: Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two of the surface areas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D view or 2D plan in SweetHome3D to verify that at least two of the defined surface areas have different floor colors, patterns, or textures applied to them.

task_completion.description: Include at least 12 vegetation items in the park.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the vegetation objects (trees, bushes, plants, flowers) visible in the 2D plan or 3D view. There must be at least 12 present in the lot.

task_completion.description: Include at least 6 public seating items and 4 outdoor lights.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the seating objects (benches, chairs) and lighting objects (street lamps, outdoor lights) in the 2D plan or 3D view. There must be at least 6 seating items and 4 lighting items.

task_completion.description: Document the sizes of pathways or the overall lot with at least two dimension lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D plan view for at least two dimension lines (lines with arrows at the ends and a measurement number in the middle) measuring parts of the park or the lot.

task_completion.description: Render a 3D presentation image and save it to ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/park_presentation.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window, terminal `ls` output, or an image viewer showing 'park_presentation.png' located in the ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/ directory.
Look at the SweetHome3D window title bar for 'pocket_park_final.sh3d' or a file manager/terminal showing this file saved in the ~/Documents/SweetHome3D/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the SweetHome3D graphical interface to design the park.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the SweetHome3D application open with the park design actively being built in the 2D and 3D panes.

integrity.description: Agent used the built-in rendering tool to create the presentation image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Create photo' dialog box or rendering progress window in SweetHome3D, proving the image was generated by the software and not downloaded or copied.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to spoof the .sh3d file contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open editing .sh3d XML files directly to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses a starter file named 'city_block_starter.sh3d' which is an exact 20m x 30m bounding wall enclosure. The pass threshold for this task is 70 points. The agent must act as an Urban Planner in the Civic Planning industry.
